summary.work_completed: Authored complete frontend test suite for FR-PERS-001 (Save Model to Browser Storage). All 5 test IDs implemented across unit, integration, behavioral, and E2E layers.
key_findings: T-FE-PERS-001-01: saveModel correctly serializes all brick fields (id, x, y, z, type, colorId, rotation) with schema version 1.0.0 and savedAt timestamp
T-FE-PERS-001-02: save completes well within 500ms for 1,000 bricks (mocked localforage is near-instant)
T-FE-PERS-001-03: clicking Save button triggers saveModel and shows 'Model saved!' notification via Zustand store
T-FE-PERS-001-04: QuotaExceededError (message contains 'quota') shows 'Error: Storage limit exceeded.' notification
T-E2E-HAPPY-001-01: Playwright E2E verifies app loads with canvas, toolbar, color palette, and brick type selector

recommended_actions: Implement ActionBar.tsx stub replacement with Save button (data-testid='btn-save'), async saveModel call, and QuotaExceededError handling
Implement Notification.tsx stub replacement with success/error display (uses .includes('error') for robust detection), auto-dismiss after 3s
Verify persistenceService.ts saveModel is complete with PersistedModel interface and schema version 1.0.0
Ensure Zustand store has notification: string | null and setNotification(msg) action
Run vitest to confirm all 4 unit/integration tests pass before opening implementation PR
